question: Which feature best distinguishes firebombing from other bombing types?

options.A: It uses precision-guided munitions to hit single targets
options.B: It uses incendiary bombs to ignite fires and create firestorms
options.C: It is conducted only by naval forces

explanation: Firebombing relies on incendiaries to start self-sustaining firestorms that overwhelm firefighting capacity, especially in wood-built cities.
